title: Python Decorators
summary: A short explanation of what this topic covers.
common_mistakes: Forgetting to return the wrapper function
practice_idea: Create a decorator that logs function calls.

title: Python Generators
summary: Functions that produce values lazily using yield instead of returning all at once.
common_mistakes: Expecting a generator to be reusable after it is exhausted
practice_idea: Write a generator that yields the Fibonacci sequence.

title: Python Context Managers
summary: Objects that manage setup and cleanup around a block of code using the with statement.
common_mistakes: Forgetting to release resources when an error occurs
practice_idea: Build a context manager that times how long a code block takes.
